name: Lady Luckless's Personal Roulette Wheel
text:
{2}, {T}: Everyone bets. Each opponent secretly picks 'red' or 'black' (left fist / right fist). Then roll two six-sided dice and add them. If the total is even, 'red' wins; if odd, 'black.' Each loser loses 3 life. Each winner gains 1 life. The wheel takes its cut: you create a Treasure for every player who bet, win or lose.
The wheel has a secret thirty-seventh slot. It is the snack. The snack always loses.
flavorText: Other wheels have a house edge. This one has a house cliff.
